reminder.label: Reminders
qa.err_past_what: The date is in the past
qa.err_past_why: We can only create events for today or future dates.
qa.err_past_fix: Edit "last Friday" to "next Friday" or pick a future date.
qa.err_no_anchor_what: I couldn't figure out the date
qa.err_no_anchor_why: You said when (like "2pm") but not which day.
qa.err_no_anchor_fix: Add a date or day: "Tuesday at 2pm" or "March 15 at 2pm".
qa.err_conflicting_fix: Pick one date or rephrase: "March 15 at 2pm".
qa.err_no_title_what: I didn't catch what the event is about
qa.err_no_title_why: You said when but not what.
qa.err_network_fix: Check your connection and try again.
qa.err_parse_fix: Try rephrasing more clearly or use manual entry.
qa.err_unknown_fix: Try rephrasing or switch to manual entry.

pricing.self_hosted_desc: Own your data. Run Synco on your own server with a one-time purchase.
landing.meta_desc: Synco — shared household calendar, budget tracker & shopping list for couples and families
landing.hero_subtitle: Calendar, budget, and shopping list in one place. For couples, families, and anyone sharing a household.
landing.features_title: Everything you need — in one app
landing.feat_calendar_desc: One shared calendar, synced with Google Calendar. Never miss an appointment again.
landing.feat_calendar_b1: Two-way Google Calendar sync — personal and shared events in one view
landing.feat_calendar_b2: Add events in seconds with smart text — just type "dentist Thu 3pm"
landing.feat_calendar_b3: Color-coded schedules per family member — see who’s busy at a glance
landing.feat_budget_desc: See where every zloty goes. No more end-of-month surprises.
landing.feat_budget_b1: Auto-categorize expenses — groceries, bills, entertainment sorted instantly
landing.feat_budget_b2: Plan vs reality comparison — spot overspending before it’s too late
landing.feat_budget_b3: One-time and recurring costs in one clean dashboard
landing.feat_shopping_desc: Shared list auto-grouped by store aisle. Groceries in 15 minutes, not 45.
landing.feat_shopping_b1: Add items by text — "milk, eggs, bread" becomes a sorted list
landing.feat_shopping_b2: Real-time sync — cross off items and everyone sees it live
landing.feat_shopping_b3: Smart aisle grouping saves you 30 minutes every shopping trip
landing.feat_notif_desc: Real-time alerts when someone changes plans. Everyone stays in the loop.
landing.feat_notif_b1: Instant push when someone adds, moves, or cancels an event
landing.feat_notif_b2: Bill reminders before the due date — never miss a payment
landing.feat_notif_b3: Fully customizable — choose exactly what you want to know about
landing.feat_sync_desc: Changes appear on every device instantly. Zero manual entry.
landing.feat_sync_b1: Import years of Google Calendar history in one click
landing.feat_sync_b2: Two-way sync — changes in Synco update Google and vice versa
landing.feat_sync_b3: Multiple Google accounts supported for the whole household
landing.feat_pwa_desc: PWA — install on your phone, use on any device
landing.feat_pwa_b1: No app store needed — install straight from your browser
landing.feat_pwa_b2: Offline access — check your schedule even without internet
landing.feat_pwa_b3: Native feel on iOS, Android, and desktop — one app for all devices
landing.step1_desc: Sign up with Google or email — literally 30 seconds
landing.step2_desc: Share a link with your partner or family — one click and done
landing.step3_desc: Calendar, budget, and shopping — all synced, zero chaos
landing.pricing_subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when Synco becomes your household essential.
landing.og_title: Synco — one calendar, budget & shopping list for two
landing.trust_headline: Join couples who tamed the household chaos
landing.trust_gdpr: GDPR compliant — your data stays safe
landing.trust_pwa: Install on your phone in one tap
landing.final_cta_desc: Join households already using Synco. No credit card required, no strings attached.
landing.final_cta_note: Free account • 30-second setup • No credit card required
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro_body: Welcome to Synco — the shared household calendar, budget tracker, and shopping list designed to keep your home life organized. Synco is operated by its developer ("we", "us", "our"). By creating an account or accessing the Synco web application at synco.app (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you must not use the Service. We encourage you to read them carefully before getting started.
terms.account_body: To use Synco you must be at least 16 years old (or the minimum digital-consent age in your jurisdiction, whichever is higher). When you create an account you agree to provide accurate information and to keep your login credentials secure. Each person may maintain only one account. You are solely responsible for all activity that occurs under your account. If you suspect unauthorized access, notify us immediately at support@synco.app. We reserve the right to disable accounts that appear to be duplicated or created in bulk.
terms.service_body: Synco provides households with a shared calendar (with Google Calendar two-way sync), collaborative budget tracking (income, expenses, and category analytics), a shared shopping list, and optional email/push notifications. The Service is available in three tiers: Free (basic features for a single household, up to 2 members), Pro (advanced analytics, unlimited history, priority support), and Family Plus (up to 6 members, multi-household support, and all Pro features). Feature availability may change between tiers. We will give at least 30 days' notice before removing a feature from a paid tier you are subscribed to.
terms.billing_body: The Free tier costs nothing and requires no payment method. Paid plans (Pro and Family Plus) are billed on a recurring monthly or annual cycle through our payment processor, Stripe. All prices are displayed inclusive of VAT where applicable. You may upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time via the Stripe Customer Portal — changes take effect at the start of the next billing cycle. If a payment fails, we will retry the charge and notify you before suspending access. Self-hosted licenses are a separate one-time purchase and are governed by the Commercial License Agreement included with the license key.
terms.ip_body: The Synco source code is released under the AGPL-3.0 open-source license — you may view, fork, and contribute to it under that license's terms. However, the Synco name, logo, brand assets, and visual design are proprietary trademarks and may not be used, reproduced, or modified without our prior written consent. User-generated content (events, budgets, shopping lists, notes) remains entirely yours. We claim no ownership over your data and will never use it for advertising, profiling, or sale to third parties.
terms.acceptable_use_body: You agree to use Synco only for lawful, personal household-management purposes. Specifically, you may not: (a) use automated scripts, bots, or scrapers to access the Service; (b) attempt to probe, scan, or test the vulnerability of the Service or breach any security measure; (c) share a single account among multiple people (invite household members instead); (d) abuse the Free tier by creating multiple accounts to circumvent plan limits; (e) upload content that is illegal, defamatory, or infringes on the rights of others; or (f) interfere with or degrade the Service for other users in any way. Violation of these rules may result in immediate account suspension.
terms.liability_body: The Service is provided on an "as-is" and "as-available" basis. While we make commercially reasonable efforts to maintain high availability, data integrity, and regular backups, we do not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or that data loss will never occur. To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law (including EU consumer protection regulations), our total aggregate liability arising out of or in connection with your use of the Service shall not exceed the total amount you have paid us in the twelve (12) months immediately preceding the event giving rise to the claim. Nothing in these Terms excludes liability for fraud, willful misconduct, or death/personal injury caused by our negligence.
terms.termination_body: You may delete your account at any time from your Profile settings. Upon deletion, your personal data, events, budgets, and shopping lists will be permanently removed from our systems within 30 calendar days. Anonymized, aggregated analytics (e.g., total user count) may be retained. We may suspend or terminate your account immediately if you materially breach these Terms, engage in abusive behavior, or if required by law. If we terminate your paid account without cause, we will refund any unused portion of your current billing period.
terms.changes_body: We may update these Terms from time to time to reflect changes in the Service, legal requirements, or business practices. For material changes, we will notify you at least 30 days in advance via the email address associated with your account and display a prominent notice within the application. If you do not agree with the revised Terms, you may cancel your account before they take effect. Continuing to use the Service after the effective date constitutes your acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms.law_body: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Poland, including the Polish Civil Code and relevant EU regulations (notably the Consumer Rights Directive 2011/83/EU and the Digital Content Directive 2019/770). Any disputes arising from or relating to these Terms shall be submitted to the competent courts in Poland. If you are an EU consumer, you also have the right to submit a complaint through the EU Online Dispute Resolution platform at ec.europa.eu/odr.
terms.contact_body: If you have any questions, concerns, or feedback about these Terms, please reach out to us at support@synco.app. We aim to respond to all inquiries within 5 business days.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.controller_body: The data controller responsible for your personal data is the operator of the Synco application. We process your data in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (EU) 2016/679 ("GDPR") and Polish data-protection law. For any privacy-related inquiries or to exercise your rights, contact us at privacy@synco.app.
privacy.data_collected_body: We collect only the data necessary to provide the Service: (a) Account data — your email address, display name, and profile picture, obtained through Google OAuth sign-in or manual registration; (b) Application data — calendar events (titles, dates, recurrence rules, notes), budget entries (amounts, categories, descriptions), shopping list items, and household membership details; (c) Technical data — IP address, browser type, device type, and timestamps of access, collected automatically for security and diagnostics. We do not collect data beyond what you enter or what is technically required to operate the Service. We never access your contacts, location, or files.
privacy.legal_basis_body: We process your data on the following legal grounds: (a) Contract performance (Art. 6(1)(b)) — your account and application data are necessary to deliver the Service you signed up for; (b) Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f)) — security logging, fraud prevention, service monitoring, and anonymized analytics to improve the product; (c) Consent (Art. 6(1)(a)) — optional email and push notifications. You may withdraw consent at any time in your notification settings without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing; (d) Legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c)) — retaining billing records and invoices as required by tax law.
privacy.usage_body: Your data is used to: deliver and personalize the Synco service (calendar, budget, shopping features); synchronize events bidirectionally with Google Calendar when you enable this integration; send notifications about upcoming events, budget alerts, and shopping reminders (only if you opt in); process subscription payments securely through Stripe; detect and prevent abuse, fraud, and security incidents; generate anonymized, aggregated statistics to improve the product (no individual user can be identified from these statistics).
privacy.sharing_body: We share the minimum necessary data with the following third-party processors: (a) Stripe (payment processing) — receives your name, email, and billing details to handle subscriptions and invoices; (b) Google (Calendar sync) — receives calendar event data only when you explicitly authorize the OAuth connection; (c) Supabase (database hosting) — hosts our database within the EU region under their Data Processing Agreement; (d) Railway (application hosting) — hosts the application infrastructure. We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data. We have no advertising partners, data brokers, or analytics-tracking partners.
privacy.cookies_body: Synco uses a single, strictly necessary session cookie to authenticate your login. This cookie does not track you across other sites, contains no personal information, and expires when you log out or after 30 days of inactivity. We also use browser localStorage to cache your preferred language and theme settings locally on your device. We do not use any tracking cookies, third-party analytics cookies (no Google Analytics, no Meta Pixel), or advertising cookies. No cookie consent banner is required because we only use strictly necessary cookies under GDPR Art. 5(3) of the ePrivacy Directive.
privacy.retention_body: We retain your data according to the following schedule: (a) Account and application data — kept for the duration of your active account; (b) Deletion upon request — all personal data, events, budgets, and shopping lists are permanently deleted within 30 calendar days after you delete your account; (c) Billing records — invoices and transaction records are retained for 5 years after the last transaction to comply with Polish tax-obligation requirements (Ordynacja podatkowa); (d) Security logs — IP addresses and access logs are retained for 90 days, then automatically purged; (e) Backups — encrypted database backups that may contain your data are rotated and purged within 30 days of your account deletion.
privacy.rights_body: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data: (a) Right of access (Art. 15) — request a copy of all data we hold about you; (b) Right to rectification (Art. 16) — correct inaccurate or incomplete data; (c) Right to erasure (Art. 17) — request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten"); (d) Right to data portability (Art. 20) — receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format (JSON); (e) Right to restrict processing (Art. 18) — limit how we use your data in certain circumstances; (f) Right to object (Art. 21) — object to processing based on legitimate interest. To exercise any of these rights, email privacy@synco.app with the subject line "GDPR Request". We will verify your identity and respond within 30 calendar days. If you are unsatisfied with our response, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Polish supervisory authority (UODO — Urząd Ochrony Danych Osobowych).
privacy.security_body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data: (a) Encryption in transit — all connections use TLS 1.2+ encryption; (b) Encryption at rest — database encryption is managed by Supabase's enterprise-grade infrastructure; (c) Authentication — we use OAuth-based authentication (Google Sign-In); no passwords are stored in our system; (d) Access control — application data is isolated per household using Row-Level Security (RLS) policies in the database; (e) Regular updates — dependencies are monitored and updated to address known vulnerabilities; (f) Incident response — in the event of a data breach, we will notify affected users and the relevant supervisory authority within 72 hours as required by GDPR Art. 33.
privacy.transfers_body: Your data is processed and stored within the European Union (Supabase EU-West region). When you enable Google Calendar sync, event data is transferred to Google's servers — this transfer is governed by Google's privacy policy and the EU-US Data Privacy Framework. We do not otherwise transfer your data outside the European Economic Area (EEA). If future infrastructure changes require transfers outside the EEA, we will ensure that adequate safeguards are in place (such as Standard Contractual Clauses) and update this policy accordingly.
privacy.children_body: Synco is not directed at children under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from anyone under 16. If we become aware that a child under 16 has provided us with personal data, we will take steps to delete such data promptly. If you believe a child under 16 is using Synco, please contact us at privacy@synco.app.
privacy.changes_body: We may update this Privacy Policy to reflect changes in our practices, legal requirements, or the Service itself. For material changes, we will provide at least 30 days' advance notice via email and an in-app notification. The "Last updated" date at the top of this page indicates when the policy was most recently revised. We encourage you to review this page periodically.
privacy.contact_body: For any privacy questions, data requests, or concerns, contact our privacy team at privacy@synco.app. We aim to respond within 5 business days. You may also write to us by postal mail (address available upon request).
refund.title: Refund & Cancellation Policy
refund.free_body: The Synco Free tier is and will always remain completely free. No credit card is required to sign up, and you will never be charged unless you explicitly upgrade to a paid plan. If you only need basic household coordination, the Free tier has you covered.
refund.saas_body: All monthly subscriptions come with a 14-day money-back guarantee, in accordance with the EU Consumer Rights Directive (2011/83/EU). If you are not satisfied, you can request a full refund within 14 days of your initial purchase — no questions asked. After 14 days, you may still cancel at any time through the Stripe Customer Portal. When you cancel, your subscription remains active until the end of the current billing period, after which it will not renew. You will not be charged again after cancellation.
refund.annual_body: Annual subscriptions also include the 14-day money-back guarantee from the date of purchase. If you request a refund within this window, you will receive a full refund of the annual payment. After the 14-day window has passed, no partial or pro-rata refunds will be issued for the remainder of the annual term. You may still cancel to prevent automatic renewal — your access will continue until the annual period expires.
refund.self_hosted_body: Self-hosted licenses are a one-time purchase that grants you a perpetual license key. Because the license key is a digital good delivered immediately upon purchase, it is non-refundable once delivered, in accordance with EU Directive 2011/83/EU (Article 16(m)) regarding the supply of digital content. We strongly recommend evaluating Synco via the Free tier before purchasing a self-hosted license to ensure it meets your needs. If you experience technical issues activating your license, contact us and we will work to resolve them.
refund.cancel_body: Cancelling is simple and can be done entirely self-service: (1) Log in to Synco and go to Settings → Billing; (2) Click "Manage Subscription" to open the Stripe Customer Portal; (3) Select "Cancel plan" and confirm. Your access continues until the end of your current billing period. No further charges will apply. You can resubscribe at any time if you change your mind.
refund.request_body: To request a refund within the 14-day guarantee period: send an email to support@synco.app with the subject line "Refund Request" and include your account email and approximate purchase date. We will process your refund within 5-10 business days. The refund will be returned to the original payment method used at checkout. You will receive an email confirmation once the refund has been issued.
refund.contact_body: For any billing questions, payment issues, or refund inquiries, contact us at support@synco.app. We typically respond within 1-2 business days. You can also check your billing history and download invoices directly from the Stripe Customer Portal.
upgrade.guarantee: ✨ 14-day money-back guarantee · Cancel anytime · Instant access
upgrade.shopping_subtitle: Auto-sorted by aisle, paste-to-add, and always in your pocket. Never forget an item again.
upgrade.shopping_b1: Smart aisle grouping — items sorted automatically
upgrade.shopping_b2: Paste multiple items at once — commas or new lines
upgrade.shopping_b3: One-tap check off while you shop
upgrade.shopping_b4: Syncs across all your devices in real-time
